pendingAmount.description: When a player transfers money, they must confirm the transfer when the amount is equal or above this value. Set to 0 to disable.

zombieKillReward.description: The default amount of currency a player receives for killing an entity. This can be overridden by roles.

transferTax.description: Tax rate applied to player-to-player transfers. 0.05 means 5% tax. The tax amount vanishes from the economy. Set to 0 to disable.

maxTransferAmount.description: Maximum amount a player can transfer in a single transaction. Set to 0 for unlimited.

showBalanceOnLogin.description: If true, players will receive a private message showing their balance when they connect to the server.
